ItacPersonItem.Notes: Nobleman, he is normally considered the promoter of the Vignaiuoli Academy in Rome. The son of Tommaso and Francesca Castiglione, the sister of Baldassarre. Uberto was appointed `segretario apostolico` in 1539. See Pompeo Litta, Famiglie celebri italiane, vol. IV, Milan, 1837.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
